metadata.title: Smart Angles and Sharp Aim Lead to a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a quick double kill where timing and positioning make all the difference. Smooth peeks and steady aim close out the round fast.
What’s your favorite angle to hold when clutching?
Share your best plays in the comments!

Drop your favorite clutch moments or tips in the comments below!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
